calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-10-2009 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2008 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-24-2008 Continued To Dec-26-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Nov-06-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing and Request for Injunction.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Curtis Christy-Cirillo, Esq. appeared for plaintiffs City and County of San Francisco, a Municipal Corporation, and the People of the State of California, by and through Dennis J. Herrera, City Attorney for the City and County of San Francisco.
Joseph Cuff, Adriel Hampton and Alex Fong, witnesses for plaintiff, were placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Walter A. Varakin, individually and as Executor of the Estate of Augusta A. Varakin.
Default was entered against defendant on Septempber 18, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on September 29, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs City and County of San Francisco, a Municipal Corporation, and the People of the State of California, by and through Dennis J. Herrera, City Attorney for the City and County of San Francisco, and against the Defaulted Defendant Walter A. Varakin, individually and as Executor of the Estate of Augusta A. Varakin as follows:

Damages/Penalties - $129,187.82.
Attorney's Fees - $38,977.50.
Costs - $205.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $1,706.182.50.

Injunction was submitted to and signed by the Court. Counsel for plaintiffs shall submit a proposed judgment to the Court no later than Friday, November 7, 2008.
